Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class RecordAction

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.RecordAction
public class RecordAction extends SObject

Java class for RecordAction complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="RecordAction">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ActionDefinition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActionType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FlowDefinition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FlowInterview" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}FlowInterview" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FlowInterviewId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsMandatory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsUiRemoveHidden" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Order" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Pinned" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Record" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Account" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
